[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00010100 2
7 01010101 4

01 10 01000000 1
12 21 11001010 4
23 32 11000010 3
34 43 10100111 5
45 54 00100011 3
56 65 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5
67 76 00000100 1
70 07 00010100 2 match 6

02 20 01000000 1
13 31 11000010 3
24 42 10001010 3
35 53 01100011 4
46 64 10001100 3
57 75 00100000 1
60 06 00000100 1
71 17 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5

03 30 01010101 4 match 7
14 41 10001010 3
25 52 01000010 2
36 63 10000100 2
47 74 00100100 2
50 05 01000001 2
61 16 10001000 2
72 27 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5

04 40 00000101 2
15 51 01000010 2
26 62 10001000 2
37 73 00110100 3
[completion]
